"use strict";(()=>{var r=new Map,u=1,l=null,s=!1;function t(n){window.parent.postMessage({jsonrpc:"2.0",...n},"*")}function c(n,e){let o=u++;return new Promise((a,d)=>{r.set(o,{resolve:a,reject:d}),t({id:o,method:n,params:e})})}function i(){let n=document.documentElement,e=Math.max(1,Math.ceil(window.innerWidth||n.scrollWidth)),o=Math.max(1,Math.ceil(n.scrollHeight));t({method:"ui/notifications/size-changed",params:{width:e,height:o}})}window.addEventListener("message",n=>{let e=n.data;if(!(!e||e.jsonrpc!=="2.0")){if(e.id!=null&&r.has(e.id)){let o=r.get(e.id);r.delete(e.id),e.error?o.reject(new Error(e.error.message||"Claude MCP Apps request failed")):o.resolve(e.result);return}if(e.method==="ui/notifications/tool-result"){l?.(e.params||{}),requestAnimationFrame(i);return}e.id!=null&&(e.method==="ping"||e.method==="ui/resource-teardown")&&t({id:e.id,result:{}})}});globalThis.NexusMcpBridge={connect(n){if(l=n,!s){s=!0,t({id:0,method:"ui/initialize",params:{appInfo:{name:"Nexus day card",version:"1.0.0"},appCapabilities:{availableDisplayModes:["inline","fullscreen"]},protocolVersion:"2026-01-26"}}),t({method:"ui/notifications/initialized",params:{}}),requestAnimationFrame(i);let e=new ResizeObserver(()=>requestAnimationFrame(i));e.observe(document.documentElement),e.observe(document.body)}return Promise.resolve()},callTool(n,e){return c("tools/call",{name:n,arguments:e})}};})();
